use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation headers
Show user avatars in comment sections or forums
Render user thumbnails in lists and tables
Provide placeholder skeleton avatars during loading states
Display user avatars in social media feeds or chat interfaces
ai_summary: A lightweight React Avatar component that displays user profile images with customizable sizing. Features a placeholder mode using a skeleton loader for loading states, supports image sources with alt text accessibility, and uses minimal styling with subtle borders for a clean, flat aesthetic that integrates seamlessly across various UI contexts.
